quote.msg: 推

replies.msg:
樓豬SOS
Send send比design group

文宣組及連登意見整合

General

1. *****‘We shall not surrender’ seems better than ‘save hk’, it is a well-known quote in foreign countries.

2. Is ‘Readers of ‘The New York Times’’, rather than New York Times reader

3. Is ‘2019 G29 Osaka summit’, not ‘G20’, and g20 is not the focus in fact

4. 相：以一敵百梁烈士推鐵馬嘅相[drawback: 外國人未必認識梁烈士] (但design group pro d, please decide on on own, just a suggestion)

5. 內文唔應該拉方格對齊，咁樣D字會有疏有密

內容

1. *****Text about 2m ppl on street and 150 tear gas seems a bit misleading, people may think the 150 tear gas was to attack the 2m ppl on street on 616

2. ***有人建議應該講多d有關外地人嘅影響!!

3. ***add a part of ‘what you can do to support us’, 因為我如果係外國人，我一睇完就覺得咁你想我做咩？

4. Should mention 任何國籍只要踏足香港就有機會被送中!

Comments

- should NOT focus on G20, since好容易比人插外國勢力

- 講下香港人有幾團結同對抗暴政既決心 毫不退縮

- 要不亢不卑 希望自由世界人民join us in the fight against totalitarianism

支持多加普選訴求 無普選 個個月都推不同既惡法
五年雨革手前就講緊普選 依家唔怕再講吧
集中個焦點先 一步步黎
